title: Customize fonts in forms

posts.author: jenrwilliams (Jennifer Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to insert custom fonts in forms. The documentation in the Help Center sayd Google fonts are possible in the Enterprise level. However it’s not working. I contacted support and they said is was not possible.

What are you trying to achieve

Have the font on the forms match our branding so we can embed the form on our website.
